description_long: This is a round pavlova cake with a rustic, slightly cracked meringue base and a thick layer of fluffy white whipped cream on top. The surface is generously decorated with fresh fruit, including halved strawberries and slices of green kiwi, arranged in a circular pattern. The meringue base appears crisp and airy, with a light beige color and uneven, natural edges. The whipped cream is piled high and looks soft and cloud-like, contrasting with the vibrant, glossy fruit. The cake is not displayed on any visible plate or stand, and the overall appearance is homemade and inviting, with a focus on fresh, natural ingredients. The cake's single tier and fruit topping give it a festive yet casual look.
description: A round pavlova cake with a cracked meringue base, topped with whipped cream and a ring of fresh strawberries and kiwi slices. The cake has a rustic, homemade appearance and vibrant fruit decoration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick whipped cream layer and a prominent ring of strawberries and kiwi slices on top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the uneven, cracked meringue base and the fruit arrangement, with strawberries more visible on the left.
description_view_2: The fruit topping is seen from a slightly different angle, with the strawberries and kiwi slices forming a clear circular pattern.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the rustic texture of the meringue and the generous whipped cream, with fruit decoration evenly distributed.
